title: Fancy Enchantments
description: This mod aims to provide powerful, fun, and configurable enchantments for adventure.
body:
**Dependency : Cloth config api**

**Support [Enchantment-Descriptions]**

# Features

This mod aims to provide powerful, fun, and configurable enchantments for adventure.

You can adjust the level limit of most enchantments and the detailed attributes of some enchantments.



Some enchantments will have elemental attributes (Aer, Aqua, Ignis, Terra, Twisted, Holy).
Aer and Terra are incompatible and Aqua and Ignis are incompatible,Twisted and Holy are incompatible.

![(use/fancyenchantments elementstat)](https://github.com/FOOLSIX/foolsix_pic/blob/main/Minecraft/Fancy%20Enchantment/elementStat.png?raw=true)
(use/fancyenchantments elementstat)


These levels change with all enchantments on the equipment.
These level will give players different buffs(or debuff given by Twisted)
These levels are important for obtaining some special and powerful enchantments

![jei](https://github.com/FOOLSIX/foolsix_pic/blob/main/Minecraft/Fancy%20Enchantment/JEIInfo.png?raw=true)


Still in production, there's more to come
There are now 80+ new enchantments in total


# Some of new stuff:

Rolling Stone
![rolling stone](https://github.com/FOOLSIX/foolsix_pic/blob/main/Minecraft/Fancy%20Enchantment/rollingstone.gif?raw=true)
Rampage!

Eater of Souls
![eater of souls](https://github.com/FOOLSIX/foolsix_pic/blob/main/Minecraft/Fancy%20Enchantment/eaterofsouls.gif?raw=true)
Draw strength from killing, but at what cost?

Empathy(Cursed)
![empathy](https://github.com/FOOLSIX/foolsix_pic/blob/main/Minecraft/Fancy%20Enchantment/empathy.gif?raw=true)
Aim, shoot, and what?

Reflecting
![reflecting](https://github.com/FOOLSIX/foolsix_pic/blob/main/Minecraft/Fancy%20Enchantment/reflecting.gif?raw=true)

 

# Notes


You can use it freely in your modpack. Even more, I encourage to configure this mod to achieve personalized experience.

Comments and suggestions are welcome.
